recommended_actions: check rank-16 indexing and vector alignment
Replace the hybrid cuBLAS+custom rank-16 kernel with a pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM implementation
Use cuBLAS for all three gemms: W @ X (size d x d), B.T @ X (size d x 16), then A @ (B.T @ X) and add to Y with beta=1
Ensure the temporary U for the low-rank result has shape {d, 16} row-major (leading dimension d) and the final accumulation uses m=d, n=d, k=16, beta=1
Double-check cuBLAS operation flags (CUBLAS_OP_N vs CUBLAS_OP_T) for each matrix operand, m/n/k dimensions, and leading dimensions; reference the qyh-style mapping
